success.headerDescription: Keep your order number and tracking token close. You can use them at any time to follow the next steps.
success.missingDescription: We could not find the latest order details on this device.
success.description: Davinto received your order. The store team will review it and continue with the next step based on your selected payment method.
success.paymentFailed: Card payment was not completed. Your order still exists, but payment may need to be retried or handled manually.
success.tokenHidden: Hidden for privacy. Reveal it only when you need to save or copy it.
success.cardPendingDescription: If you already paid, wait a moment and refresh the order tracking page. If payment failed, contact the store with your order number.
success.title: Order Success | Davinto

track.headerDescription: Use the order number and private tracking token from your confirmation to see the latest status.
track.label: Tracking
track.required: Order number and tracking token are required.
track.paymentFailed: Card payment was not completed. You can retry payment below if the order is still pending.
track.retryDescription: If you closed the payment page or the payment failed, you can retry the secure card payment.
track.paymentLinkError: Payment link could not be opened. Please contact the store.
track.paymentRetryError: Could not regenerate card payment link.
track.waitingDescription: Your order status will appear here after you search with a valid order number and tracking token.

my.headerDescription: Review every order placed while signed in, including delivery progress, payment state, and the pieces in each order.
my.guestNote: Guest orders can still be tracked from Track Order using the order number and tracking token.
my.emptyDescription: Orders placed while signed in will appear here. Existing guest orders remain available through public tracking.
my.lookingForGuest: Looking for an order placed as a guest? Use its order number and tracking token on the public Track Order page.
